mapper.insert: INSERT INTO project_agents(project_id, name, role, model_tier, status, parent_id) VALUES ( #{project_id}, #{description.name}, #{description.role, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{description.modelTier}, #{description.status, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{description.parent, typeHandler=reengineering.ddd.mybatis.support.RefIntegerTypeHandler} )
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(id) FROM project_agents WHERE project_id = #{project_id}
